name: Reptilianne Coatl
name_jp: レプティレス・コアトル
desc: If you control a DARK Reptile monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, then, if your opponent controls any monsters with 0 ATK, you can Special Summon up to an equal number of "Reptilianne" monsters from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Reptilianne Coatl" once per turn. If this card you control would be used as Synchro Material for a Reptile monster, you can treat it as a non-Tuner.
mnst_eff: If you control a DARK Reptile monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, then, if your opponent controls any monsters with 0 ATK, you can Special Summon up to an equal number of "Reptilianne" monsters from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Reptilianne Coatl" once per turn. If this card you control would be used as Synchro Material for a Reptile monster, you can treat it as a non-Tuner.
eff: If you control a DARK Reptile monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, then, if your opponent controls any monsters with 0 ATK, you can Special Summon up to an equal number of "Reptilianne" monsters from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Reptilianne Coatl" once per turn. If this card you control would be used as Synchro Material for a Reptile monster, you can treat it as a non-Tuner.

stat_change: Treats itself as a non-Tuner monster
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
